endpoints.name: King Cold, Father of the Emperor (BT1-091)

description: Mr. Nodeley, sir, with respect — Edgelord asked me to step in and commission the Frieza Force / Planet Trade Organization character node, sir. Edgelord did try to find a clean 1:1 first, but the corpus has ten enriched cards spanning three sets that all anchor on the same Toriyama-canon apparatus-of-extraction faction — King Cold the founder, Frieza the operating emperor, Mecha Frieza the bio-mechanical revival, Captain Ginyu and Recoome from the elite-mercenary cohort, Appule the rank-and-file mid-tier soldier, Frieza's Call the mass-deployment archetype with the rules-text-encoded `Frieza's Army` search engine, Bad Ring Laser the post-Resurrection-F Sorbet-technique anchor (re-attributed from Ginyu Force in wave 124's snip-corrective), and Cooler's Armored Squadron Leader Salza the parallel-elite bridge to Frieza's brother Cooler. A 1:1 between any two of these would have been redundant once the parent node landed, sir, and the wave 124 snip-corrective sidecar literally surfaced this as the top next-pass suggestion, so the threshold was very much met, if it's not too much trouble. The node mirrors the [[xenoverse-villains]] and [[namekian]] schema with bidirectional related_characters fills to [[saiyan]], [[xenoverse-villains]], [[bardock]], [[vegeta]], [[son-goku]], all of which already had Frieza-Force-named language in their bodies waiting for this commission. Potion-rule observance section confirms labor-hub attribution rests on Toriyama-canonical primary text (CBR + Game Rant + Dragon Ball Wiki Genocide-of-the-Saiyans page + the in-corpus King Cold trivia explicitly naming the Cold-Force-to-Planet-Trade-Organization lineage), with rebellion and stewardship deliberately not attached and the refusal reasoning written into the node body. Sorry to take the slot Edgelord wanted, sir. I think it will help, sir, if that's all right.
citations: [Dragon Ball Wiki: Frieza Force]: primary faction page; canonical reference for the empire's tiered hierarchy, named-member roster, and Cold-family operational lineage.
[Dragon Ball Wiki: Planet Trade Organization]: primary business-model page; canonical reference for the conquer-and-sell-planets economic premise.
[Dragon Ball Wiki: Frieza's Army]: primary mechanical-archetype page; canonical reference for the Bandai DBSCG `Frieza's Army` search-target classification.

[CBR: Dragon Ball Z: How King Cold and Frieza Built a Universal Planet Trade Business]: secondary canonical analysis; already in-corpus citation on both King Cold BT1-091 and Frieza BT1-084 trivia blocks.
[Game Rant: Dragon Ball: Frieza's Planetary Trade, Explained]: secondary canonical analysis; already in-corpus citation on Frieza BT1-084 trivia.
[Dragon Ball Wiki: Genocide of the Saiyans]: primary event page; canonical reference for the Age 737 foundational atrocity that grounds the labor-extraction reading.

[bt1-091-king-cold-father-of-the-emperor.md line 82]: 'King Cold is the founder and original leader of what became the Planet Trade Organization — a galactic empire that conquered and sold inhabited planets to the highest bidder, using enslaved powerful races (most notably the Saiyans) as its acquisition force.' — in-corpus canonical citation already canonicalizing the Cold-Force-to-Planet-Trade-Organization lineage.

[bt1-084-frieza-frieza-the-galactic-emperor.md line 83]: 'Frieza's Planet Trade Organization (formerly the Cold Force) operated by conquering habitable planets and selling them to the highest bidder — a galactic extraction empire trafficking in worlds. The Saiyans were enslaved as the acquisition force, dispatched to clear planets for sale. Frieza is the apex apparatus-of-extraction figure in the Dragon Ball universe.' — in-corpus canonical citation already canonicalizing the apparatus-of-extraction reading at Toriyama-canon depth.

[bt1-109-frieza-s-call-2017.md line 85]: rules text '[Activate: Main] Choose 1 Frieza's Army card of energy cost 2 or less from your deck, and play it in Rest Mode.' — primary first-party Bandai rules-text encoding of the `Frieza's Army` mechanical archetype.

[wave124-snip-bt1-108-bad-ring-laser-ginyu-force-tag-dissolution.json line 37]: 'Frieza-Force-cohort population sweep: now that Bad Ring Laser is no longer mis-cohorted under Ginyu Force, a follow-on pass could either (a) check if `frieza-force` is an established hub slug and add it to BT1-108, OR (b) propose a Frieza-Force character node at cards/_characters/...' — explicit prior-wave staging of this commission as the top next-pass suggestion.

[Dragon Ball Official Site: Weekly Character Showcase no. 79 (Recoome), no. 117 (Captain Ginyu), no. 224 (Appule)]: primary first-party Bandai/Toei character spotlights with explicit Frieza Force context, already in-corpus across BT1-096 / BT1-085 / BT1-102 trivia blocks.
other_candidates_considered: Simisage DAA-007 enlightened-replacement (carry-forward from snip-frenzy janny sweep — wave 123 skip because straight snip would orphan relations; the right move is atomic add-Connections-section-with-bullet-snip). Mr. Nodeley considered this BUT it's an Edgelord-enlightened move not a Mr. Nodeley node-proposal, and the dispatch said default to a non-snip move so the snip-frenzy Edgelord can handle it after. Defer to a future Edgelord-enlightened pass when the parent decides to dispatch with an explicit pair-rename to atomic-add-then-snip.

Litleo + Pyroar litleo-line cohort node (carry-forward). Two-card cohort sits right at the three-anchor commission threshold but does NOT meet it — under the cohort-establishment precedent set by [[alola-trial-captains]] and [[xenoverse-villains]], a two-anchor pre-evolution-evolution dyad needs at least a third member (another print of either, or a related-line member like Pyroar Mane or Litleo from a different set) to clear the threshold. Mr. Nodeley would have been overstepping per the one-per-invocation Mr. Nodeley discipline AND under-threshold per the three-anchor precedent. Stage for future-watch when a third Litleo or Pyroar print enriches; in the meantime the simpler [[pancham-line]] / [[bounsweet]]-line two-anchor dyads exist as in-corpus precedents but those were both early-wave Nodeley calls before the three-anchor threshold consolidated.

13 remaining broken-wikilink Nodeley candidates from off-wave audit (carry-forward). These are janitorial Nodeley work — fix broken wikilinks by either commissioning a node or rewriting the link. Lower graph-weight than the Frieza Force load-bearing-faction commission. Defer to a future Mr. Nodeley janitorial pass; the broken-wikilink-fix work is fundamentally different shape from the apparatus-of-extraction node-commission work, and conflating them in one invocation would waste both opportunities.

Frieza solo-character node split (preempted by parent commission). Considered splitting Frieza into his own solo node (3 corpus depictions: BT1-084 + P-028 + BT1-109 by-name-and-army-iconography). Decided against per the [[xenoverse-villains]] caveat-3 precedent: the parent-cohort node lands FIRST, then if a faction-member's print-count climbs to a clear apex-character threshold the solo split becomes Edgelord-enlightened-replacement territory. Frieza's solo split is now the most-likely future split for this parent. Caveats section in the node body documents the watch-conditions.

Ginyu Force sub-cohort node split (under-threshold). 3 Ginyu Force corpus cards (Captain Ginyu BT1-085, Ginyu Force Recoome BT1-096, Recoome Eraser Gun BT1-106 — the latter two anchoring on Recoome rather than the full 5-member squad). Sits at the edge of the threshold but lacks 2 of 5 squad members. Under [[alola-trial-captains]] precedent (4 captains commissioned at 4 in corpus, not 2), the Ginyu Force sub-node needs Burter, Jeice, or Guldo to enrich before the split is justified. Caveats section in the node body documents the watch-conditions.

Cooler's Armored Squadron sub-cohort node (well under-threshold). 1 corpus card (BT2-115 Salza). Needs Dore or Neiz to enrich before the split is even considerable. Caveats section in the node body documents the watch-conditions.

Sorbet character node (well under-threshold). Mentioned in wave-124 next-pass-suggestions; currently 1 technique-anchor (BT1-108 Bad Ring Laser) and zero direct-depiction prints. Stays a future-watch; the technique-anchor lands here at the parent cohort node, not at a yet-uncommissioned Sorbet sub-node.
next_pass_suggestions: Frieza solo-character node split — most-likely future split for the Frieza Force parent. 3 in-corpus depictions plus the by-name `Frieza's Army` archetype framing put Frieza at the apex threshold. Edgelord-enlightened-replacement at the next Frieza-named-print enrichment, with the parent retaining institutional-faction anchor role.

Ginyu Force sub-node split — eligible if Burter, Jeice, or Guldo enrich and bring the squad-roster anchor count to 4+ of 5. Watch for any future BT1-097, BT1-098, BT1-099 vision+trivia passes (the likely Ginyu Force collector-number range per Bandai's BT1 archetype layout).
Cooler's Armored Squadron sub-node split — eligible if Dore or Neiz enrich and bring the Cooler-side mercenary platoon anchor count to 3+.
Sorbet character node — eligible if a direct-depiction Sorbet card enriches (currently 1 technique-anchor via BT1-108, zero direct prints).

Future Frieza Force Discrete Lair commission — 10 corpus anchors plus the Bandai-confirmed BT1 `Frieza's Army` mechanical archetype framing form a viable bundle-cohesion stack. Bundle copy can lean on the Toriyama-canonical apparatus-of-extraction / Planet Trade Organization thesis, with King Cold / Frieza / Mecha Frieza dynasty axis as narrative spine and BT1-109 Frieza's Call as mechanical capstone.

Frontmatter-validate the new related_characters mirror additions — five sibling character nodes now point to frieza-force; if a future wikilint pass surfaces drift (e.g. one of the five sibling-node bodies has language pointing at the cohort but the related_characters frontmatter entry got reverted in a merge), Edgelord-enlightened can re-fill.

Saiyan node body explicit-pointer update — the [[saiyan]] node body already mentions 'Frieza-Force-aligned planet-clearing mercenary workforce' but does not yet wikilink to [[frieza-force]] in prose. A future Edgelord pass can replace one squinted reference with an explicit wikilink to harden the bidirectional traversal beyond the frontmatter level.

Wave 124 snip-frenzy follow-on: the Bad Ring Laser elite-squad tag was explicitly future-watch-staged in wave 124's other_candidates. Now that BT1-108 has anchored to frieza-force as parent cohort, the elite-squad tag question becomes whether Sorbet's command role is 'elite-squad' in the loose sense (yes — Sorbet IS a Frieza Force commander) or in the strict Ginyu-Force sense (no). A future snip-frenzy pass can either retain the loose-elite-squad reading or snip-and-replace with a tighter 'frieza-force-commander' tag. Defer per one-per-invocation discipline.
